item.title: From Grader Blade to Forged Tool
item.description: See how a worn road grader blade is transformed into a functional forged tool, with cutting, shaping, heat treatment, and finishing steps.

media:content.media:title: From Grader Blade to Forged Tool
media:content.media:description: See how a worn road grader blade is transformed into a functional forged tool, with cutting, shaping, heat treatment, and finishing steps.

item.title: Forging an Axe from a Railroad Spike
item.description: Watch the process of forging an axe from a railroad spike, including shaping, heat treatment, and finishing for a durable and functional tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Axe from a Railroad Spike
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of forging an axe from a railroad spike, including shaping, heat treatment, and finishing for a durable and functional tool.

item.title: Making a Quilt Square from Start to Finish
item.description: Follow the complete process of creating a quilt square, from fabric selection and cutting to sewing and finishing, for a beautiful and handmade result.

media:content.media:title: Making a Quilt Square from Start to Finish
media:content.media:description: Follow the complete process of creating a quilt square, from fabric selection and cutting to sewing and finishing, for a beautiful and handmade result.

item.title: Forging an Herb Chopper
item.description: Watch a blacksmithing demo on forging an herb chopper, covering shaping, hammering, and finishing to create a durable and functional kitchen tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Herb Chopper
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmithing demo on forging an herb chopper, covering shaping, hammering, and finishing to create a durable and functional kitchen tool.

item.title: Forging a Steel Scoop
item.description: Watch the process of forging a steel scoop, from shaping and hammering to finishing, creating a durable and functional tool for everyday use.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Steel Scoop
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of forging a steel scoop, from shaping and hammering to finishing, creating a durable and functional tool for everyday use.

item.title: Forging a Prospector’s Trowel
item.description: Step-by-step guide to forging a prospector’s trowel, covering shaping, hammering, and finishing techniques for a durable and practical mining tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Prospector’s Trowel
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step guide to forging a prospector’s trowel, covering shaping, hammering, and finishing techniques for a durable and practical mining tool.

item.title: Forging a Bending Fork from Salvaged Steel
item.description: See how salvaged steel is transformed into a functional bending fork, with forging, shaping, and finishing steps for a durable workshop tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Bending Fork from Salvaged Steel
media:content.media:description: See how salvaged steel is transformed into a functional bending fork, with forging, shaping, and finishing steps for a durable workshop tool.

item.title: Adapting a Handle for a Weed Whacker
item.description: Learn how to modify and fit a new handle for a weed whacker, improving comfort, control, and durability with practical, easy-to-follow steps.

media:content.media:title: Adapting a Handle for a Weed Whacker
media:content.media:description: Learn how to modify and fit a new handle for a weed whacker, improving comfort, control, and durability with practical, easy-to-follow steps.

item.title: Blacksmithing: Anvils and Substitutes
item.description: Explore different anvils and anvil substitutes, comparing materials, sizes, and uses to help blacksmiths choose the right tools for their projects.

media:content.media:title: Blacksmithing: Anvils and Substitutes
media:content.media:description: Explore different anvils and anvil substitutes, comparing materials, sizes, and uses to help blacksmiths choose the right tools for their projects.

item.title: How to Silence the Anvil Ring
item.description: Learn effective methods to reduce or eliminate anvil ringing, improving focus and safety while blacksmithing with clear, practical techniques.

media:content.media:title: How to Silence the Anvil Ring
media:content.media:description: Learn effective methods to reduce or eliminate anvil ringing, improving focus and safety while blacksmithing with clear, practical techniques.

item.title: How to Forge a Trivet
item.description: Step-by-step guide to forging a sturdy trivet, including shaping, hammering, and finishing techniques for a practical and stylish kitchen accessory.

media:content.media:title: How to Forge a Trivet
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step guide to forging a sturdy trivet, including shaping, hammering, and finishing techniques for a practical and stylish kitchen accessory.

item.title: Blacksmithing: Forging a Spatula
item.description: Learn how to forge a steel spatula from start to finish, including shaping, hammering, and finishing techniques for a durable and practical kitchen tool.

media:content.media:title: Blacksmithing: Forging a Spatula
media:content.media:description: Learn how to forge a steel spatula from start to finish, including shaping, hammering, and finishing techniques for a durable and practical kitchen tool.

item.title: How to Make a Door Knocker
item.description: A step-by-step look at crafting a durable door knocker, covering design, forging, and finishing techniques for a functional and long-lasting result.

media:content.media:title: How to Make a Door Knocker
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step look at crafting a durable door knocker, covering design, forging, and finishing techniques for a functional and long-lasting result.
